home.ageWarning: Play hard, drink smart, remember everything
home.title: {brand}
home.subtitle: Deploy. Drink. Dominate. The tactical party game that turns every gathering into a legendary mission.
home.featuredSubtitle: Premium tactical-style barware designed for maximum party impact
home.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of party commanders who have deployed {productName} at their gatherings. Free shipping on orders over {freeShippingThreshold}.
home.aboutUs1: {brand} is a party brand for grown-ups who like their fun a little over the top. We design tactical-style party games and novelty barware that look pulled from an armory, but exist purely for laughs, late-night stories and unforgettable evenings. No real props, no violence — just a playful parody wrapped in premium, gift-ready design.
home.aboutUs2: We're building a full party universe — commanders, missions, rules of engagement and traditions that become part of your squad's story. Every product is built to be gifted: to friends, colleagues and that one person who has everything except their own tactical bar setup.
home.aboutUs3: At the core of {brand} is one simple house rule: drink smart, play smart, and never take yourself too seriously. We stand for fun that stays fun — with clear limits, a designated driver lined up before deployment, and memories you actually want to remember the next day.
home.missionText: Turn every gathering into a memorable operation — stories worth retelling, not regretting.
home.whatWeBringText: Tactical-style gifts, premium build, and a full party universe — commanders, missions and house rules included.
home.ourPromiseText: Fun that stays fun: clear limits, responsible drinking and a next-day debrief you actually remember.
home.designatedDriverNote: Deploy with a designated driver and your best squad.

product.ageWarningFull: 18+ ONLY · DRINK RESPONSIBLY · NOT FOR SALE TO MINORS

howToPlay.title: How to Play {productName}
howToPlay.subtitle: Master the tactical party in 3 easy steps
howToPlay.step1Desc: Set up your shot shells in formation on the table. Each commander places tactical obstacles strategically to block the opposing squad.
howToPlay.step2Desc: Take turns launching your shot. Hit an opponent's shell — they drink. Hit an obstacle? The whole squad sips. Strategy wins the night.
howToPlay.step3Desc: Last commander standing wins the mission. The defeated salute the victor and accept their fate as the party's official drink mixer.
howToPlay.rule2: Always drink responsibly and know your limits
howToPlay.rule3: Designate a sober driver before the mission begins
howToPlay.rule4: Stop playing if anyone feels uncomfortable or unwell

about.title: About {brand}
about.subtitle: Tactical precision meets premium party gifting.
about.missionText: We turn ordinary gatherings into legendary missions. Every piece in our gift case is built to make the night memorable — no real props, just premium-grade fun for grown-ups.
about.teamText: Founded by party commanders tired of forgettable shot games, our crew combines game design, vintage-poster aesthetics, and professional partying. Every product is shaped on a real table, with a real squad, and a real designated driver.
about.valueResponsibleFunText: We promote drinking smart, knowing your limits, and lining up a sober driver before the mission begins. Every package ships with clear age and safety guidance.
about.valueQualityFirstText: Our novelty barware is built from tactical-grade materials so it survives every party — from the first toast to the closing salute.
about.valueCommunityText: We listen to the commanders who use our kit and ship updates based on real-world debriefs.
about.ctaSubtitle: Thousands of commanders trust Drunken Arsenal for tactical evenings that stay legendary into the morning.

notFound.description: The target you're looking for has gone dark or never existed.

notify.description: Drop your email — we'll ping you at launch with an early-bird 10% off and the Recipe Manual PDF.

footer.tagline: The tactical party game for party commanders.
